title: MongoDB's Design System – LeafyGreen Framework
content: LeafyGreen from Directories: Components: LeafyGreen is MongoDB's Design System, designed for internal products. Design System provides a set of detailed guidelines for various elements, including icon creation and grid layouts. Design System contains a wide-ranging component library with live examples, design guides, and code documentation. LeafyGreen streamlines the design and development process, ensuring consistency and coherence across MongoDB's product ecosystem.
